contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Fix optimize_mobile_responsive.py upstream generator bugs + sweep 100+ residual pages
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/88
  
  Details:
  Fixed three bugs in scripts/optimize_mobile_responsive.py (the generator that produces partner pages and other site outputs): (1) regex `[^}]*` landing inside child rule, nesting body{overflow-x:hidden} invalidly; (2) broken Python operator-precedence idempotency check that re-injected the rule on re-runs; (3) same fragile pattern on .nav-links:not(.mobile-menu) injection. Replaced with brace-balanced walks + top-level rule injection before </style>. Added defensive cleanup pass that strips legacy nested-orphan body{} blocks. Self-healed 55 non-partner pages PR #87 missed. Three consecutive runs go 81 -> 55 -> 0 modifications (idempotent). 0 residual orphan signatures across full site post-merge.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
